title: geum lyratum
intro: Geum lyratum, also known as the white avens, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The health benefits of Geum lyratum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional herbal remedies to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
